title: Facelift: Serialized Streetview image dataset with beauty ratings
content:
# Facelift: Serialized Streetview image dataset with beauty ratings

Authors: Joglekar, Sagar
Published: 2019-05-20T15:23:26Z
Subjects: Arts and Humanities, Computer and Information Science
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/PSKSOE

The caffe models are trained on Street view images. These images are serialized into lmdb format for caffe. This dataset contains the train and validation lmdb sets, with the images and their respective beauty ratings.

Citation: Joglekar, Sagar, 2019, "Facelift: Serialized Streetview image dataset with beauty ratings", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/PSKSOE, Harvard Dataverse, V1
